text.title: AI Trust Disclosure Patterns Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the ai-trust-disclosure-patterns methodology end-to-end.

step.name: map-axes-to-ui
step.action: For each of 5 disclosure axes, locate the UI element that surfaces it; if missing, request a design change.

step.name: draft-confidence-bands
step.input: Model confidence score distribution from eval
step.action: Map score bands to UI treatment (badge / tone / hedge phrase). 3-band default: confident / likely / uncertain.

step.name: wire-citation-pipeline
step.action: Every factual claim emits a citation slot; if retrieval confidence below threshold, slot shows 'source unavailable'.
step.decision-gate: If > 20% of outputs have empty citation, the source corpus is insufficient — go back to spec.

step.name: build-opt-out-and-reporting
step.action: One-click opt-out, persisted in user prefs. Per-output thumbs-down with free-text route to eval-set growth pipeline.

step.name: legal-design-eng-signoff
step.action: Three-way review: legal (regulatory), design (clarity), engineering (instrumentation). Sign-offs stored in artefact JSON.
step.output: Disclosure artefact ready; ship gate cleared.
